parsed_review.summary: CP00-654 is a descriptor-only RP21 Admin Console "synthetic fixture and permission matrix" slice (150 units, risk C, RP21.P05.M06.S02-RP21.P06.M03.S19) that holds its claimed boundaries. Verified via read-only inspection: (1) Counts are internally consistent across registry requirements, contract projection, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and the coverage validator — deliverable distribution {fixture:33,implementation:59,security_audit:22,test:15,claude_review:7,hermes_evidence:4,ui:10}=150, phase counts P05:89/P06:61, and all micro-phase/micro-title/section-row counts match; partial head M06 correctly starts at S02 (19 rows, S01 in CP00-653) and tail M03 ends at S19 (19 rows, S20 deferred to CP00-655). (2) No-write/no-real-data/descriptor-only boundaries are enforced in code: freezeCp654Result stamps ~35 false-flags and validateAdminConsoleCp654SyntheticPermissionMatrixDescriptor actively asserts descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false/raw_payload_included=false per row plus fixture/permission/test-evidence contract negatives; model.test.js and the contract validator deep-equal the regenerated projection. (3) Manifest sets production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, runtime_opened=false; the production_ready_flag is scoped to descriptor verification, not runtime/enterprise trust. (4) Claude remains read_only with promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; Hermes patterns are confined to deterministic evidence-packet/receipt labeling (H21.CP00-654...) with runtime_receipt_emitted=false. (5) CP178+ review hardening satisfied: readiness auth preflight passed (1436-byte valid-JSON stdout, exit 0), command-evidence records all 22 commands at exit 0, and no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced-prose/tool-call-shaped evidence is relied upon. No P0/P1/P2 issues; two non-blocking P3 informational notes recorded. The current pending receipts (construction-inspection PENDING, command-evidence passed_pending_review, claude-review-result pending) reflect the state awaiting this review and are expected to be finalized downstream upon this PASS.

findings.title: Pack-level review-receipt finalization is pending (expected workflow state)
findings.details: claude-review-result.json shows status "pending", exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, valid_review_receipts=[], and parsed_review.overall_verdict="PENDING" with blocks_pack_closeout=true. The raw-output.json and review-receipt.json referenced by review-request.json are not yet present because this hardened read-only run is what generates them. Correspondingly, construction-inspection.json (verdict PENDING, pack_level_claude_review_completed=false, admin_console_synthetic_permission_matrix_descriptor_verified=false), command-evidence.json (status passed_pending_review), and adjudication.md (Production ready: no) are all in their pre-review state. This is the expected closeout sequencing, not a code defect.
findings.recommendation: Downstream normalization + receipt validation should confirm exactly one valid pack-level run from this PASS, then flip the pending receipts (inspection PENDING->PASS, command-evidence ->passed, claude-review-result ->complete, adjudication ->production ready) before closing CP00-654 and advancing the queue head to CP00-655 / RP21.P06.M03.S20.
findings.post_review_disposition: Acknowledged as expected closeout sequencing; non-blocking. This review supplies the previously-pending independent verdict.

findings.title: Validation-command pass status taken from recorded evidence under read-only boundary
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), the 22 validation commands recorded at exit_code 0 in command-evidence.json and the auth preflight recorded as passed in readiness-report.json cannot be independently re-executed. The PASS verdict is corroborated by static inspection showing the registry CP654 binding/requirements, service descriptor/case-set/evidence-packet/handoff builders, validators (validateAdminConsoleCp654Coverage + validateAdminConsoleCp654SyntheticPermissionMatrixDescriptor), tests in model.test.js, and the regenerated contract projection are mutually consistent and enforce the descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data invariants the commands assert.
findings.recommendation: Treat the recorded command-evidence and readiness auth preflight as the authoritative execution record; the independent static review confirms the source is consistent with those results. No action required unless command-evidence is regenerated and drifts from the inspected source.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accepted; recorded evidence is internally consistent with inspected source. Non-blocking.
